title: Weapons droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:UnknownImperialBattleDroids.jpg|right|thumb|Weapons droids being destroyed by Luke Skywalker|200px]]
'''Weapons droids''' were [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] used by scavengers on the [[Second Battle of Coruscant|battle]]-torn [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] dispatched some by destroying their internal mechanisms with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] during the fighting there.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]]
*[[Dark Empire 1|''Dark Empire'' 1]] {{1st}}
